title: How can AI achieve AGI?
summary: AGI needs architectural breakthroughs beyond just scaling—test-time compute, neuro-symbolic hybrids, world models. Transformers hit a wall at compositional reasoning (37.6% on novel tasks). o3's 45% jump proves inference matters more than size.

title: Verify the narrative, mind share and token state of Jimothy the Raccoon coin.
summary: Two Jimothy tokens exist—4Cyye6 is an 82%-holder honeypot with $0.21 liquidity (scam). The real Ge87E token launched July 16 with Seattle's viral raccoon, hit $3.7M mcap, 4,181 holders—but carries extreme memecoin volatility risk.

title: How to effectively combat the situation involving a memecoin on the Solana network based on deep and thorough research?
summary: The FBI's IC3 portal at ic3.gov/CrimeInfo/Cryptocurrency is the primary weapon—documented South Korea prosecution netted 3 scammers for $4.1M memecoin fraud. Pair with ContractGuard AI for pre-emptive honeypot detection.

title: What are concrete recommendations based on deep and thorough research on how to address the infestation caused by the So
summary: RugCheck's API data proves insider networks—SOLdiers had 58 insider wallets in 7 networks. Solution: mandate platform-level verification scores on all DEX interfaces, implement 10-min launch delays, educate traders to check holder concentration before buying.

title: What actions has Iran taken outside their territorial waters and in Oman's territorial waters?
summary: Iran seized the Stena Impero in Oman's waters (July 2019), launched drone strikes there (Feb 2026), and conducted joint naval exercises with Oman (Oct 2024). Also took multiple tankers in Gulf of Oman international waters.
